name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.OnFireHelper.RollTorqueScale
summary: Scale rolling torque that is applied to character spine by bodyWrithe. Torque magnitude is calculated with the following formula: m_rollOverDirection*rollOverPhase*rollTorqueScale.
remarks:
Default value = 25.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 300.0f.
